item.title: Senior Python Engineer, Fulfil
item.description: Job Title Senior Python Engineer Job Description About Fulfil Fulfil is the modern ERP for commerce. Built to power the fastest-growing eCommerce brands, our platform brings together order management, inventory, accounting, and more, turning complex operations into a strategic advantage. We’re trusted by brands like HexClad, Ridge Wallet, Caraway, and Resident, and backed by people who want to change the way merchant operations are run. We believe in deep work, radical accountability, and buildi

item.title: Junior Software Developer (Apprentice)
item.description: Are you looking to launch a career in software development while working on something that genuinely matters? UCS Assist is building Project Atlas , a clinically-led, purpose-built platform that powers international medical repatriation and travel assistance operations. We’re not building another generic tool. We’re building critical infrastructure that helps get patients home safely from anywhere in the world. We’re looking for one or two ambitious, curious Junior Developers to join the Atlas b

item.title: Technical Lead
item.description: This is a rare opportunity to be the first technical hire on a greenfield platform that genuinely matters. UCS Assist is building Project Atlas, a purpose-built, clinically-led case management and governance platform for international medical repatriation and travel assistance. We’ve done the architectural groundwork: a well-defined system blueprint, a harmonised data model and glossary, a clear module roadmap, and a sound compliance position including MHRA Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) aw

item.title: Web Developer
item.description: The Web Developer (Django) is responsible for creating products and experiences that present Crossway content to the marketplace with truth, beauty, and excellence. This role will be primarily focused on web application development. Remote candidates are acceptable, though preference will be given to those who can meet periodically in Wheaton, IL. The Web Developer (Django) will meet on a regular basis with the Director of Web Development for the purpose of collaboration, reviewing progress, and

item.title: PyPI Sustainability Engineer
item.description: About the Role The Python Software Foundation is hiring a contract Sustainability Engineer, PyPI , reporting to the Director of Engineering. This role focuses on building features in Warehouse , PyPI's codebase, with the goal of helping make PyPI financially sustainable so it does not rely entirely on donations and sponsorships. PyPI organization accounts launched in 2025 as the first revenue stream, and this role will help expand that foundation. You will spend most of your time shipping featur

item.title: Software Engineer @ RINSE
item.description: Rinse provides dry cleaning and laundry delivery services to customers in twelve metropolitan areas in the US and Canada. The engineering team is distributed across the United States and internationally and has been entirely remote for years, though a desk can be provided in listed cities. Open to newly-graduated and more senior engineers who meet the bar. Looking for true full-stack engineers with strong React / Typescript / CSS skills and comfort in a Python / Django environment. Also seeking

item.title: Staff Engineer @ Blueberry Pediatrics
item.description: Blueberry Pediatrics provides affordable, high-quality pediatric telemedicine with board-certified pediatricians and at-home medical kits, available 24/7. The company is growing its B2B and D2C business and seeks senior/full-stack engineering talent to help deliver this product. The role emphasizes engineering ingenuity, alignment with patient-first outcomes, and collaboration with a product team. Technologies mentioned include Django, Hotwire Turbo (HTMX-like), PyTorch, scikit-learn, and Flutte

item.title: Founding Engineer @ myDataValue.com
item.description: We are an AI-driven Hospitality Tech platform helping vacation rental owners automate their revenue on Booking.com. We are bootstrapped, profitable (£100k ARR), and growing month-on-month. We are looking for a Founding Engineer (Python/Django) to partner with us (2 founders) and scale our infrastructure. This is a fullstack role (React) involving high-volume scraping, browser automation & agents. Stack: Python, Django, Postgres, React. Challenge: Enterprise-scale scraping (1000s req/s), reverse

item.title: Senior Django Developer @ SKYCATCHFIRE
item.description: Our team transforms complex business operations into elegant, reliable systems. We prioritize "Email > Meetings" and protected focus time to ensure we build robust Django backends properly rather than settling for quick fixes. If you’re a self-motivated pro who takes pride in mastering your craft and using AI to work smarter, we offer a stable, predictable environment to solve deep technical challenges. For full info, visit: https://www.skycatchfire.com/careers/django-developer/ Open roles: http

item.title: Founding Engineer @ Halfpricesoft
item.description: Halfpricesoft, a profitable bootstrapped company in the small business payroll and tax compliance space, is transitioning legacy solutions to a modern cloud-native suite and seeks a Founding Engineer. You will report directly to the Founder, own the technical roadmap, help build and mentor the engineering team, lead the transition from legacy systems to modern cloud architecture, and manage/scale Kubernetes deployments. Tech stack includes Python (Django), React, Kubernetes, and other cloud-nati

item.title: Founding Engineer (Full-Stack) @ DrSwarm
item.description: DrSwarm is building AI-driven workflow automation for healthcare clinics / health systems (scheduling, RCM/billing workflows, patient ops). This is a true 0→1 role: ship fast, talk to customers, own systems end-to-end. You will: - Build product end-to-end (Next.js + Django) - Ship integrations + workflow automation (APIs, webhooks, background jobs, queues) - Own reliability (logs/metrics, retries, failure modes) and pragmatic security (HIPAA-aware) Stack: Next.js, React/TypeScript, Django/Python

item.title: Senior Backend Developer @ thelab
item.description: We're a digital agency focused on e-commerce, marketing, creative production and increasingly, AI-powered workflows to make our own teams more productive. We're hiring a senior backend developer to lead a greenfield ML/NLP project building workflow automations across image production, design, analytics/performance reporting and more. You'll work on a growing team on the technical side with access to talent in every department as we build tools to support our internal processes.

item.title: Senior Backend Engineer (AI Systems) @ Waypoint AI
item.guid: senior backend engineer ai systems|waypoint ai
item.description: Waypoint AI is a Czech-American B2B startup building "Chip", an AI support engineer that autonomously triages, routes, and resolves complex technical support cases. Raised $3.1M and already in production with customers including Volvo and ClickHouse. Small engineering team; using AI (e.g., Claude) as a collaborator. Hiring for Senior Backend Engineer (AI Systems), Fullstack Engineer, and Frontend Developer. Office in Prague 7 (Holešovice), remote-friendly. To apply, email joinus@mywaypoint.ai wi

item.title: Senior Frontend Engineer @ Weave Bio
item.description: Weave Bio is a Series A (<50 person) regulatory AI SaaS startup building an AI-native regulatory automation management platform for novel therapeutics. Hiring multiple positions including Senior/Staff Backend (Django, Python), Senior/Staff Frontend (TypeScript, React), Staff DevOps (AWS, Linux, SRE), Senior Product Designer, Senior Product Manager, and Senior/Lead SDR. Roles are hybrid and based in San Francisco, CA. Apply via company careers page.

item.title: Senior Backend Engineer @ Brico
item.description: Brico automates financial licensing for Financial Institutions and FinTechs, handling license applications, maintenance, and renewals across 50+ US jurisdictions. Series A company based in San Francisco, CA. Revenue has grown 600% over 2.5 years with customers such as Marqeta, BitGo, Conduit and Bilt. Small backend-focused engineering team of 6. Hiring senior/staff backend engineers who are comfortable working up the stack. Tech stack: python/django + DRF / react. Reach out to the Co-Founder/CTO

item.title: Medical Device Software Engineer @ Innolitics
item.description: Innolitics builds AI/ML software for medical devices — the kind that detects ear infections, tracks metastatic cancer, and plans radiation therapy. 60+ FDA clearances. We're a remote-only firm (since 2012) that does engineering, regulatory, and cybersecurity under one roof. Our team includes MDs, PhDs, and software engineers. Clients range from Series A startups to large device companies. We're hiring for three roles: 1. Physician-Scientist (MD/PhD) — Biostatistics & AI Software Development: MD

item.title: Senior Backend Engineer @ Courted
item.description: We're building AI-powered recruiting and market intelligence for real estate — an industry that moves $100B+ in annual commissions and still runs on spreadsheets and cold calls. Our backend ingests data from dozens of sources, processes millions of records daily through Celery pipelines, and serves real-time analytics via a Django REST API backed by PostgreSQL/PostGIS. Integrations with OpenAI, HubSpot, Twilio, and MLS data providers. Sub-second response requirements at scale. Stack: Python, Dja

item.title: Mobile Engineer @ RINSE
item.description: Rinse provides dry cleaning and laundry delivery services to customers in twelve metropolitan areas in the US and Canada. The company has sophisticated logistics optimization software, a polished consumer product, and firm business fundamentals. Engineering is distributed across the United States and internationally and has been entirely remote for years, though a desk can be provided in listed cities. Open to newly-graduated and more senior engineers. Seeking true full-stack engineers with stro

item.title: Senior AI Engineer @ BillionToOne
item.description: BillionToOne builds molecular diagnostics detecting disease at the single-molecule level (prenatal and oncology). Over 1M tests processed; revenue growth to ~$300M and guiding $415-430M for 2026; publicly traded and GAAP profitable. Hiring multiple senior software roles to work with clinicians and computational biologists on problems including scaling genomic pipelines, building digital infrastructure for complex test results, and shipping high-correctness systems. Hybrid role based in Menlo Par

item.title: Software Engineer II - Applied AI @ YCharts
item.description: YCharts is an investment research platform that financial advisors and asset managers use to make smarter investing decisions and create visuals that effectively communicate their strategies. We’re looking for a mid-level or senior engineer to join our AI engineering team. The team focuses on building AI agents for investment research, financial data visualization, and advisor meeting preparation. Full-time, remote (US only).

item.title: Backend Engineer @ Twindo (Formerly Canvas)
item.description: At Twindo, we’re working on spatial computing - using computer vision to 3D reconstruct and understand your surroundings so that software can operate over real-world spaces. Twindo brings together everything that professionals need to understand the spaces they design, build, and manage, without extra site visits or second-guessing. With a quick scan or plan upload, any space becomes structured, accurate, design-ready data your whole team can actually use. Roles: Backend Engineer (Europe or LatA

item.title: Lead Engineer (Backend) @ Onos Health
item.description: Onos Health is a well-funded healthcare AI company focused on reducing waste in behavioral health spend by improving care quality, catching fraud, automating reviews, and guiding members to proper clinical pathways. The company ships AI-driven solutions for health plans and works with major payers. Tech stack includes Python/Django, Next.js/TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and AWS (Bedrock, ECS, Glue, S3); they also use Claude Code and CodeRabbitAI. Hiring for: Staff Software Engineer (AI) to build LLM p

item.title: Fullstack Engineer (backend-leaning) @ Pinwheel
item.description: Pinwheel is the Plaid for payroll — APIs and SDKs that give banks, fintechs, and lenders real-time, consumer-permissioned access to payroll data across 1,800 platforms covering 80% of US workers. Series B. Roles: Fullstack Engineer (backend-leaning) (Python / Django, Go) and Fullstack Engineer (frontend-leaning) (React, Next.js). Hybrid 3x/week in NYC (Union Square). Visa sponsorship not available.

item.title: Multiple roles @ Weave Bio
item.description: Weave Bio (Series A) has developed an AI-native platform to help research and discovery scientists accelerate FDA regulatory submission. Hiring multiple full-time roles including Senior and Staff Backend and Frontend Engineers, Senior Product Designer, Senior Technical Product Manager, and an Operations Specialist for Customer Experience. Company careers: https://weave.bio/careers. Apply here: https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/weave. Location: San Francisco (SF). Hybrid/Onsite 3 days/week (Tues/W

item.title: Product Engineer @ Baserow
item.description: Baserow is an open-source no-code platform for databases, applications, automations. We’re a remote team across 12 countries. We’re hiring a Product Engineer to work end-to-end across the stack. - Product ownership from idea to launch - Full-stack work across backend and frontend - Open-source product - Remote-first, high-autonomy team - Stack: PostgreSQL, Python/Django, Vue/Nuxt. Job link: https://baserow.io/jobs/product-engineer

item.title: Senior Software Engineer @ Ping Data Intelligence
item.description: Ping Data Intelligence (Miami, FL) is hiring a Senior Software Engineer to work onsite in Delhi, India. The role involves working alongside the data entry team to increase efficiency, streamline processes through ML and UI improvements, and triage and fix bugs that occur overnight (US time). Occasional work from home is available. Responsibilities include identifying bottlenecks, building tooling to increase throughput and accuracy, developing ML-driven and UI-based improvements, triaging and re

item.title: Security Engineer @ Authentik Security
item.description: Authentik Security (https://goauthentik.io) is the company behind authentik (https://github.com/goauthentik/authentik), an open source identity provider with 1M+ unique installations. Help us replace Okta/Auth0, Ping Identity, and Microsoft Entra with modern, secure identity for all! We are a small remote team, looking to scale up with experienced software engineers, primarily with a backend security focus. Bonus points if you have significant experience with identity/SSO standards and/or Django

item.title: TypeScript Engineer @ Fusionbox
item.description: Fusionbox is a software engineering consultancy that builds enterprise software and open sources client code. Engineers contribute to Django core and the company sponsors PyCon, DjangoCon, and Django Girls. They seek software engineers who value software design, system architecture, and collaboration, comfortable with areas including web application security, relational database design (PostgreSQL), Django internals, React, and distributed systems. Work includes building complex state machines f
